title: Amazon aims to raise $25 billion from bond sale, Bloomberg News reports
description: Amazon is set to secure a minimum of twenty-five billion dollars through a U.S. bond initiative. This strategic decision is aimed at bolstering the company's burgeoning investments in artificial intelligence infrastructure. As the tech landscape evolves, major players such as Meta and Alphabet have also turned to debt markets to fuel their AI ambitions. The funds raised will primarily address corporate needs and manage impending debt obligations.

title: Amazon aims to raise $25 billion from bond sale, Bloomberg News reports
description: Amazon plans to raise at least twenty-five billion dollars through a new bond sale. This move aims to fund the company's significant investments in artificial intelligence technology. Other major tech firms are also tapping debt markets for similar costly AI infrastructure build-outs. These companies are expected to spend over seven hundred billion dollars on AI this year. The offering size may increase based on investor demand and market conditions.

title: AI stocks fall after Samsung Electronics' strong profit forecast fails to impress
description: AI stocks are seesawing lower and weighing on Wall Street. The S&P 500 slipped 0.2% Tuesday, even though the majority of stocks within the index rose. The drops for stocks in the artificial-intelligence industry dragged the Nasdaq down 0.8%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average added 133 points. The weakness began in Asia, where Samsung Electronics tumbled 6.9% in Seoul despite offering what analysts called a strong forecast for upcoming results. AI stocks worldwide have been under pressure because of worries their prices shot too high. Oil prices rose, which pushed upward on Treasury yields in the bond market.
content:
NEW YORK (AP) — AI stocks are seesawing lower Tuesday and weighing on Wall Street.
